The '''ongun-nur''' were large [[Bird/Legends|bird]] creatures native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. Despite their great, intimidating size, the ongun-nur were generally timid creatures. They usually traveled in large flocks. They had yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], pointed beaks, and their bodies were large, but mostly filled with air.

The ongun-nur had very thin wings, and were unable to fly against the wind. They instead went wherever the wind took them.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
